div.p: Sign in to start your shift

div.style: width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--odfe-primary-light); color: var(--odfe-primary); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; margin: 0 auto 12px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;

width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--odfe-primary-light); color: var(--odfe-primary); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px;

div.div: Orders will appear here once created

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px; padding: 16px; background: var(--odfe-glass-bg); border-radius: var(--odfe-radius-xl); border: 1px solid var(--odfe-glass-border);
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;
width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--odfe-primary-light); color: var(--odfe-primary); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px;

div.div: Type a name or phone number to find customers

label.style: display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--odfe-text-secondary);

div.style: background: var(--odfe-glass-bg); border: 1px solid var(--odfe-glass-border); border-radius: var(--odfe-radius-xl); padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 24px; text-align: left;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 8px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px;

label.style: display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--odfe-text-secondary);
display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--odfe-text-secondary);

div.t-att-style: table.id === state.selectedTableId ? 'border: 2px solid var(--odfe-primary); background: var(--odfe-primary-light)' : ''

div.div: Tables will appear here for this floor

div.style: background: var(--odfe-glass-bg); border: 1px solid var(--odfe-glass-border); padding: 20px; border-radius: var(--odfe-radius-xl); text-align: center;
background: var(--odfe-glass-bg); border: 1px solid var(--odfe-glass-border); padding: 20px; border-radius: var(--odfe-radius-xl); text-align: center;

label.style: display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--odfe-text-secondary);

div.style: background: var(--odfe-glass-bg); padding: 16px; border-radius: var(--odfe-radius-lg); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 24px; border: 1px solid var(--odfe-glass-border);
cursor: pointer; padding: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15,118,110,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0));

width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--odfe-primary); color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(15,118,110,0.3);
cursor: pointer; padding: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(212,163,115,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0));

width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--odfe-accent); color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(212,163,115,0.3);
cursor: pointer; padding: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(34,197,94,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0));

width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--odfe-success); color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(34,197,94,0.3);
cursor: pointer; padding: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(56,189,248,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0));

width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: var(--odfe-info); color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(56,189,248,0.3);
background: white; padding: 16px; border-radius: var(--odfe-radius-xl); display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 16px;
width: 200px; height: 200px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 12px;
